channel.title: Weeklypedia
channel.description: The most edited Wikipedia articles and discussions from the last week

item.title: Weeklypedia - March 13, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 74,993 authors made 765,935 changes to 392,721 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Iran war (1,911 changes by 288 authors)
  2. Mojtaba Khamenei (731 changes by 237 authors)
  3. 2026 Nepalese general election (630 changes by 64 authors)
  4. Deaths in 2026 (537 changes by 100 authors)
  5. Tornadoes of 2026 (390 changes by 71 authors)
  6. Spore (2008 video game) (370 changes by 27 authors)
  7. Balen Shah (334 changes by 126 authors)
  8. List of University of the Arts (Philadelphia) people (310 changes by 3 authors)
  9. 2026 UK Open (284 changes by 29 authors)
  10. 2026 Men's T20 World Cup final (281 changes by 45 authors)
  11. List of United States tornadoes from January to March 2026 (280 changes by 38 authors)
  12. 2026 BNP Paribas Open – Men's singles (277 changes by 29 authors)
  13. Helene Pons (272 changes by 5 authors)
  14. 2026 BNP Paribas Open – Women's singles (266 changes by 35 authors)
  15. Timeline of the Gaza war (3 October 2025 – present) (265 changes by 4 authors)
  16. 2026 United States House of Representatives elections (252 changes by 38 authors)
  17. Soham murders (239 changes by 78 authors)
  18. Country Joe McDonald (234 changes by 45 authors)
  19. Gwen Wakeling (219 changes by 1 authors)
  20. 2026 Ruichang China Masters (219 changes by 8 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. Helene Pons (273 changes by 5 authors)
  2. 2026 Ruichang China Masters (220 changes by 8 authors)
  3. Temple Israel synagogue shooting (204 changes by 44 authors)
  4. 2026 Old Dominion University shooting (119 changes by 20 authors)
  5. Bam Adebayo's 83-point game (115 changes by 50 authors)
  6. Edward Jacob "Jake" Lang (108 changes by 29 authors)
  7. Anthony Russell (murderer) (91 changes by 34 authors)
  8. Clemence Acland (87 changes by 5 authors)
  9. 2026 Glasgow fire (87 changes by 20 authors)
  10. Dark Auction (83 changes by 6 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 Iran war
  2. Donald Trump
  3. Gaza genocide
  4. Mojtaba Khamenei
  5. 2026 Minab school airstrike

item.title: Weeklypedia - March 6, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 73,878 authors made 848,553 changes to 474,932 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Tehran explosions (5,565 changes by 719 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (731 changes by 128 authors)
  3. Assassination of Ali Khamenei (731 changes by 215 authors)
  4. Ali Khamenei (685 changes by 240 authors)
  5. Israeli attack on girls' elementary school in Minab (398 changes by 104 authors)
  6. Reactions to the 2026 Iran conflict (385 changes by 99 authors)
  7. 2026 Gorton and Denton by-election (377 changes by 79 authors)
  8. Timeline of the 2026 Iran conflict (373 changes by 52 authors)
  9. 2026 United States House of Representatives elections (340 changes by 34 authors)
  10. Prelude to the 2026 Iran conflict (327 changes by 127 authors)
  11. Elimination Chamber (2026) (323 changes by 90 authors)
  12. 2026 Men's T20 World Cup (320 changes by 37 authors)
  13. Interim Leadership Council (318 changes by 77 authors)
  14. 2026 United States House of Representatives elections in Texas (318 changes by 54 authors)
  15. 2026 BNP Paribas Open – Women's singles (317 changes by 31 authors)
  16. Timeline of the Gaza war (3 October 2025 – present) (316 changes by 4 authors)
  17. List of people named in the Epstein files (309 changes by 25 authors)
  18. Sinking of IRIS Dena (307 changes by 103 authors)
  19. 2026 BNP Paribas Open – Men's singles (292 changes by 29 authors)
  20. Mojtaba Khamenei (285 changes by 122 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Tehran explosions (5,566 changes by 719 authors)
  2. Assassination of Ali Khamenei (732 changes by 215 authors)
  3. Israeli attack on girls' elementary school in Minab (399 changes by 104 authors)
  4. Reactions to the 2026 Israeli–United States strikes on Iran (386 changes by 99 authors)
  5. Timeline of the 2026 Israeli–United States strikes on Iran (374 changes by 52 authors)
  6. Interim Leadership Council (319 changes by 77 authors)
  7. Sinking of IRIS Dena (308 changes by 103 authors)
  8. 2026 Austin bar shooting (284 changes by 50 authors)
  9. Wedding of Mary, Queen of Scots, and the Earl of Bothwell (228 changes by 3 authors)
  10. 2026 Iranian leadership crisis (221 changes by 86 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 Israeli strikes on Iran
  2. Ali Khamenei
  3. Assassination of Ali Khamenei
  4. 2026 Minab school airstrike
  5. 2026 Afghanistan–Pakistan war

item.title: Weeklypedia - February 27, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 76,398 authors made 873,111 changes to 485,693 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Deaths in 2026 (536 changes by 91 authors)
  2. Jean Constantin (472 changes by 2 authors)
  3. 2026 Gorton and Denton by-election (414 changes by 106 authors)
  4. Charles Thau (404 changes by 3 authors)
  5. February 2026 nor'easter (344 changes by 49 authors)
  6. 2026 Jalisco operation (343 changes by 112 authors)
  7. 2026 Men's T20 World Cup (289 changes by 37 authors)
  8. Perdido Street Station (273 changes by 2 authors)
  9. Dewi Evans (269 changes by 12 authors)
  10. Johns Manville (268 changes by 3 authors)
  11. Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes (263 changes by 144 authors)
  12. Alysa Liu (242 changes by 116 authors)
  13. 2026 State of the Union Address (232 changes by 73 authors)
  14. List of people named in the Epstein files (230 changes by 40 authors)
  15. 2026 Afghanistan–Pakistan conflict (215 changes by 60 authors)
  16. Timeline of the Gaza war (3 October 2025 – present) (211 changes by 5 authors)
  17. Restore Britain (206 changes by 44 authors)
  18. Eileen Gu (198 changes by 69 authors)
  19. Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (189 changes by 7 authors)
  20. 2026 Welsh Open (snooker) (187 changes by 14 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Jalisco operation (344 changes by 112 authors)
  2. 2026 Afghanistan–Pakistan conflict (216 changes by 60 authors)
  3. Georgian slang (186 changes by 3 authors)
  4. 2026 Mar-a-Lago shooting (171 changes by 31 authors)
  5. Enid Barraud (156 changes by 2 authors)
  6. 2026 Dubai Tennis Championships – Men's singles (121 changes by 19 authors)
  7. The Kerala Story 2: Goes Beyond (116 changes by 41 authors)
  8. 2026 ATX Open – Singles (116 changes by 12 authors)
  9. 2026 Abierto Mexicano Telcel – Singles (113 changes by 15 authors)
  10. List of United States post offices in New Jersey (104 changes by 2 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Zionism
  2. List of people named in the Epstein files
  3. Ideological bias on Wikipedia
  4. Elliot Rodger/GA1
  5. Restore Britain

item.title: Weeklypedia - February 20, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 75,104 authors made 797,675 changes to 419,139 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Men's T20 World Cup (659 changes by 56 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (596 changes by 92 authors)
  3. Restore Britain (507 changes by 119 authors)
  4. Ice hockey at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's tournament (447 changes by 110 authors)
  5. List of people named in the Epstein files (437 changes by 45 authors)
  6. Venie Atherton (371 changes by 5 authors)
  7. 2026 Pawtucket shooting (343 changes by 69 authors)
  8. United States at the 2026 Winter Olympics (341 changes by 29 authors)
  9. Jan Freidlin (341 changes by 11 authors)
  10. Robert Duvall (322 changes by 125 authors)
  11. 2026 Dubai Tennis Championships – Women's singles (314 changes by 21 authors)
  12. 2026 Tumbler Ridge shooting (309 changes by 97 authors)
  13. List of members of the 13th Jatiya Sangsad (291 changes by 50 authors)
  14. 2026 Bangladeshi general election (280 changes by 63 authors)
  15. Jesse Jackson (271 changes by 107 authors)
  16. The Marching 101 (260 changes by 10 authors)
  17. Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor (228 changes by 70 authors)
  18. Connections of Jeffrey Epstein (226 changes by 20 authors)
  19. Tarique Rahman (224 changes by 62 authors)
  20. United States Securities and Exchange Commission (220 changes by 6 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Pawtucket shooting (344 changes by 69 authors)
  2. 2026 Rio Open – Singles (133 changes by 22 authors)
  3. Death of Quentin Deranque (129 changes by 52 authors)
  4. 2026 Qatar ExxonMobil Open – Singles (121 changes by 18 authors)
  5. Maties (rugby union) (119 changes by 7 authors)
  6. List of ships present at International Fleet Review 2026 (116 changes by 7 authors)
  7. 2026 Delray Beach Open – Singles (106 changes by 16 authors)
  8. Paducah Indians (baseball) (101 changes by 7 authors)
  9. José María Balcázar (99 changes by 38 authors)
  10. List of United States post offices in Mississippi (96 changes by 3 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 Tumbler Ridge shooting
  2. Imane Khelif
  3. List of people named in the Epstein files
  4. Restore Britain
  5. Kaja Kallas

item.title: Weeklypedia - February 13, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 76,934 authors made 745,614 changes to 371,040 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Tumbler Ridge school shooting (1,108 changes by 260 authors)
  2. 2026 Men's T20 World Cup (669 changes by 48 authors)
  3. Deaths in 2026 (499 changes by 91 authors)
  4. Prominent individuals mentioned in the Epstein files (465 changes by 60 authors)
  5. 2026 Bangladeshi general election (462 changes by 60 authors)
  6. Super Bowl LX (408 changes by 137 authors)
  7. Super Bowl LX halftime show (394 changes by 106 authors)
  8. 2026 Japanese general election (390 changes by 116 authors)
  9. Wimmera Football League (373 changes by 4 authors)
  10. Nile (362 changes by 6 authors)
  11. 2025 Bondi Beach shooting (308 changes by 29 authors)
  12. 2026 Qatar TotalEnergies Open – Singles (295 changes by 29 authors)
  13. United States at the 2026 Winter Olympics (292 changes by 30 authors)
  14. Disappearance of Nancy Guthrie (282 changes by 88 authors)
  15. Deaths in June 1982 (282 changes by 1 authors)
  16. 2026 Winter Olympics opening ceremony (262 changes by 102 authors)
  17. Bicentennial Capitol Mall State Park (261 changes by 4 authors)
  18. Madan Paliwal (258 changes by 7 authors)
  19. James Van Der Beek (242 changes by 74 authors)
  20. Figure skating at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Team event (231 changes by 25 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Tumbler Ridge school shooting (1,109 changes by 260 authors)
  2. 2026 Islamabad suicide bombing (189 changes by 77 authors)
  3. Progresses of Mary, Queen of Scots (139 changes by 1 authors)
  4. 2026 Liberal Party of Australia leadership spill motion (133 changes by 36 authors)
  5. 2026 ABN AMRO Open – Singles (114 changes by 17 authors)
  6. 2009 Italian Beach Soccer League (101 changes by 5 authors)
  7. 2026 Argentina Open – Singles (95 changes by 12 authors)
  8. 2026 Dallas Open – Singles (92 changes by 13 authors)
  9. List of United States post offices in Virginia (77 changes by 1 authors)
  10. Benjamin Farar Sr. (75 changes by 6 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Imane Khelif
  2. 2026 Tumbler Ridge school shooting
  3. Twitter
  4. Prominent individuals mentioned in the Epstein files
  5. Killing of Alex Pretti

item.title: Weeklypedia - February 6, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 79,149 authors made 779,480 changes to 392,916 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Deaths in 2026 (599 changes by 101 authors)
  2. Catherine O'Hara (581 changes by 235 authors)
  3. 2026 Gorton and Denton by-election (574 changes by 96 authors)

  7. 2025 Bondi Beach shooting (400 changes by 40 authors)
  8. Iron Lung (film) (375 changes by 162 authors)

  11. Moltbook (276 changes by 65 authors)

  17. Carlos Alcaraz (215 changes by 103 authors)
  18. 2026 SAFF U-19 Women's Championship (212 changes by 19 authors)
  19. Ligas Distritales del Peru (212 changes by 1 authors)
  20. Relationship of Mette-Marit, Crown Princess of Norway, and Jeffrey Epstein (208 changes by 30 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. Moltbook (277 changes by 65 authors)
  2. January 2026 Balochistan suicide bombings (253 changes by 104 authors)
  3. Relationship of Mette-Marit and Jeffrey Epstein (209 changes by 30 authors)
  4. Prominent individuals mentioned in the Epstein files (208 changes by 53 authors)
  5. NCAA Season 101 volleyball tournaments (199 changes by 12 authors)
  6. 2025 Italian Beach Soccer League (177 changes by 2 authors)
  7. Trovador Ramos Sr. (162 changes by 13 authors)
  8. Disappearance of Nancy Guthrie (153 changes by 63 authors)
  9. Italian Beach Soccer League (121 changes by 2 authors)
  10. 2023 World Winners Cup (114 changes by 5 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Killing of Alex Pretti
  2. Melania (film)
  3. Donald Trump
  4. The Super Mario Bros. Movie
  5. Moltbook

item.title: Weeklypedia - January 30, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 77,490 authors made 762,188 changes to 393,627 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. January 24, 2026, ICE shooting in Minneapolis (1,708 changes by 253 authors)
  2. January 2026 United States winter storm (817 changes by 177 authors)
  3. Deaths in 2026 (608 changes by 115 authors)
  4. Ajit Pawar (468 changes by 224 authors)
  5. Triple J Hottest 100, 2025 (390 changes by 16 authors)
  6. Operation Metro Surge (372 changes by 106 authors)
  7. Nile (364 changes by 6 authors)
  8. 2026 Gorton and Denton by-election (315 changes by 87 authors)
  9. 2026 Australian Open – Day-by-day summaries (305 changes by 15 authors)
  10. 2026 Thailand Masters (badminton) (290 changes by 12 authors)
  11. 2025 Bondi Beach shooting (289 changes by 27 authors)
  12. Chaurashi Vaishnavan ki Varta (260 changes by 4 authors)
  13. 2026 Australian Open – Men's singles (244 changes by 57 authors)
  14. Royal Rumble (2026) (243 changes by 75 authors)
  15. 2026 European Men's Handball Championship (224 changes by 46 authors)
  16. 2025–2026 Iranian protests (223 changes by 57 authors)
  17. Super Bowl LX (220 changes by 63 authors)
  18. Board of Peace (215 changes by 67 authors)
  19. Iliana Iotova (215 changes by 90 authors)
  20. Border 2 (208 changes by 24 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. Chaurashi Vaishnavan ki Varta (261 changes by 4 authors)
  2. SATENA Flight 9885 (149 changes by 43 authors)
  3. 2026 Baramati Learjet 45 crash (142 changes by 53 authors)
  4. List of U.S. postage stamps featuring Colorado (140 changes by 4 authors)
  5. Literary work of Tudor Arghezi (126 changes by 4 authors)
  6. 2026 MV Trisha Kerstin 3 sinking (111 changes by 20 authors)
  7. Minnesota general strike (106 changes by 46 authors)
  8. Aruba national football team results (103 changes by 2 authors)
  9. Cumberland Hotel (88 changes by 2 authors)
  10. Streets of Minneapolis (82 changes by 28 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. January 24, 2026, ICE shooting in Minneapolis
  2. 2025–2026 Iranian protests
  3. Donald Trump
  4. Board of Peace
  5. January 2026 North American winter storm

item.title: Weeklypedia - January 23, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 77,393 authors made 785,069 changes to 405,978 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Greenland crisis (1,308 changes by 203 authors)
  2. Ligas Distritales del Peru (659 changes by 2 authors)
  3. List of years in television (631 changes by 10 authors)
  4. Deaths in 2026 (618 changes by 99 authors)
  5. Bigg Boss Kannada season 12 (584 changes by 244 authors)
  6. 2026 Australian Open – Men's singles (549 changes by 63 authors)
  7. 2026 Australian Open – Women's singles (442 changes by 57 authors)
  8. 2026 Adamuz train derailments (399 changes by 135 authors)
  9. Board of Peace (398 changes by 98 authors)
  10. 2025–2026 Iranian protests (374 changes by 76 authors)
  11. Killing of Renée Good (371 changes by 61 authors)
  12. 2025–26 NFL playoffs (356 changes by 65 authors)
  13. Operation Arctic Endurance (352 changes by 109 authors)
  14. Freak folk (351 changes by 3 authors)
  15. Victorian Athletic League (328 changes by 1 authors)
  16. 2026 northeastern Syria offensive (327 changes by 55 authors)
  17. Valentino (fashion designer) (312 changes by 83 authors)
  18. 2026 Indonesia Masters (309 changes by 17 authors)
  19. 2026 Bangladeshi general election (298 changes by 46 authors)
  20. Operation Metro Surge (283 changes by 39 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Adamuz train derailments (400 changes by 135 authors)
  2. Bibliography of sources in Lucien Lévy-Bruhl's ethnological research (194 changes by 6 authors)
  3. 2026 Indonesia Air Transport ATR 42 disappearance (178 changes by 62 authors)
  4. 2026 Gul Plaza Shopping Mall fire (162 changes by 52 authors)
  5. Hands off Greenland protests (126 changes by 40 authors)
  6. Paris Saint-Germain Volleyball (122 changes by 2 authors)
  7. 2026 Uganda protests (109 changes by 33 authors)
  8. 2026 Northern Syria clashes (104 changes by 14 authors)
  9. List of Pi Kappa Delta chapters (93 changes by 3 authors)
  10. Happy Patel: Khatarnak Jasoos (91 changes by 29 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. American hybrid warfare against Greenland during the second Trump administration
  2. Donald Trump
  3. Killing of Renee Good
  4. Reform UK
  5. 2025–2026 Iranian protests

item.title: Weeklypedia - January 16, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 76,426 authors made 753,203 changes to 383,536 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Killing of Renée Good (1,147 changes by 197 authors)
  2. 2025–present Iranian protests (1,081 changes by 218 authors)
  3. Deaths in 2026 (648 changes by 91 authors)
  4. Bigg Boss (Tamil TV series) season 9 (558 changes by 222 authors)
  5. American hybrid warfare against Greenland during the second Trump administration (539 changes by 59 authors)
  6. Văcărești Prison (492 changes by 2 authors)

  8. 2025–26 NFL playoffs (377 changes by 68 authors)

  13. Nile (296 changes by 15 authors)
  14. 2026 AFC U-23 Asian Cup (278 changes by 38 authors)
  15. 2025 Bondi Beach shooting (261 changes by 35 authors)
  16. 2026 India Open (252 changes by 26 authors)
  17. 2026 Sikhio train disaster (248 changes by 74 authors)
  18. Deaths during the 2025–2026 Iranian protests (227 changes by 57 authors)
  19. New Year Sprint (226 changes by 2 authors)
  20. MLBB M7 World Championship (219 changes by 6 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Sikhio district train disaster (249 changes by 74 authors)
  2. Adelaide Writers' Week boycott (162 changes by 32 authors)
  3. Operation Metro Surge (121 changes by 17 authors)
  4. Showa American Story (118 changes by 1 authors)
  5. Yeison Jiménez (97 changes by 37 authors)
  6. Shri Yashoda Ma (95 changes by 1 authors)
  7. Ljiljana Petrović (manager) (90 changes by 3 authors)
  8. Jacques Aupick (85 changes by 7 authors)
  9. 1940 Ligas Provinciales de Lima y Callao (83 changes by 2 authors)
  10. 2025 All-Pro Team (82 changes by 20 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Killing of Renee Good
  2. 2025–present Iranian protests
  3. Gaza genocide
  4. Donald Trump
  5. American hybrid warfare against Greenland during the second Trump administration

item.title: Weeklypedia - January 9, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 74,954 authors made 706,872 changes to 342,881 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 United States strikes in Venezuela (3,057 changes by 575 authors)
  2. Killing of Renee Good (1,067 changes by 220 authors)
  3. 2025–2026 Iranian protests (762 changes by 155 authors)

  7. Deaths in 2026 (574 changes by 108 authors)
  8. Delcy Rodríguez (548 changes by 207 authors)

  17. American hybrid warfare against Greenland during the second Trump administration (246 changes by 33 authors)

  19. 2025 Bondi Beach shooting (233 changes by 40 authors)
  20. The Traitors (British TV series) series 4 (217 changes by 50 authors)

New Articles

  1. 2026 Caracas airstrikes (3,058 changes by 575 authors)
  2. 2026 ICE Minneapolis shooting of protestor (1,068 changes by 220 authors)
  3. International reactions to the 2026 United States strikes in Venezuela (530 changes by 149 authors)

  5. American hybrid warfare against Greenland during the second Trump administration (247 changes by 33 authors)
  6. John Vickers (abolitionist) (166 changes by 6 authors)
  7. List of United States politicians by generation (135 changes by 6 authors)
  8. Northern Rising (1405) (124 changes by 6 authors)
  9. Veyseloglu Group of Companies (106 changes by 2 authors)
  10. Charles Shepard (artist) (93 changes by 5 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 Venezuela explosions
  2. 2026 Minneapolis ICE shooting
  3. Nicolás Maduro
  4. Gaza genocide
  5. Donald Trump
